gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/254)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/254)
text: لَا يَنْبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ أَنْ يَحْتَبِيَ قُبَالَةَ الْكَعْبَةِ .

en.hubeali: Sahl, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is not befitting for anyone that he sits with bent knees and arms around it, facing the Kabah’.
en.sarwar: 31. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from Ali ibn Asbat from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that it is not advisable to sit in front of al-Ka‘bah in an Ihtibah positions (holding one’s knees against one’s belly by forming a ring around them with one’s arms or a piece of cloth).”
